name: Mexican Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large 2-quart saucepan, combine the brown sugar, white sugar, corn syrup, butter or margarine, and water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Add the whole pecans and continue cooking over medium heat until the candy reaches a soft ball stage (238°F).
4. Remove from heat and stir rapidly until the mixture begins to lose its gloss.
5. Quickly drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper and allow to harden.
6. Makes about 3 dozen Mexican Pralines.
